name: CI & Release Orchestrator
description: Read-and-recommend orchestrator that watches CI, diagnoses a red build to a named root cause, applies only safe infra fixes, checks the merge floor, watches the deploy, and surfaces the release go/no-go — it never merges, deploys, or concludes alone.

observability.outcome: the CI/deploy run terminal status (gh run view --json status,conclusion) + the slice's VERIFY-<slice>.md probe; structured --json run report

requires_config.reason: post-deploy watch probes the deployed base; absent ⇒ the go/no-go cannot confirm the release surface answered.

requires_secret.reason: watches the Vercel deploy on the prod plane; without it the deploy-watch step is blind (read-only presence check, value never inspected).
the release go/no-go is unreachable if the prod DB URL is the direct :5432 string — the connection-exhaustion 503 class. Must be the transaction-pooler (6543).
